def compute_factor(df: pl.DataFrame) -> pl.Series:
    # Sort by code and date for per-code rolling operations
    df = df.sort(['code', 'date'])

    # 20-day average volume
    adv20 = rolling_mean(pl.col('volume'), window=20)

    # Volume ratio: volume / adv20
    vol_ratio = pl.col('volume') / adv20

    # ts_rank of vol_ratio over 20-day window (per code)
    ts_rank_vol = ts_rank(vol_ratio, window=20)

    # -1 * delta(close, 7)
    neg_delta = -delta(pl.col('close'), periods=7)

    # ts_rank of neg_delta over 8-day window (per code)
    ts_rank_delta = ts_rank(neg_delta, window=8)

    # Multiply the two ts_ranks
    factor = ts_rank_vol * ts_rank_delta

    return df.select(factor).to_series()
